# Frontend Patterns (React + Vite + TanStack)

_Applies when: building a Vite + React 19 frontend with TanStack Router/Query under FSD._

Concrete conventions on top of `10-fsd.md` and `05-stack.md`. Visual quality is non-negotiable — see the design rules; verify UI in the browser, never just test-green.

## Data layer (TanStack Query)

- **Queries** live in `entities/<x>/api/` as `queryOptions()` factories — reusable, typed, cache-key-stable.
- **Mutations** live in `features/<x>/api/` (the layer that owns the user action).
- Centralize query keys (e.g. `shared/config/queryKeys.ts`) as functions returning `const` tuples, so invalidation stays consistent.
- Sensible defaults: `staleTime` set deliberately, `refetchOnWindowFocus: false`, `retry: 1`. Use `networkMode: 'always'` when automation browsers wrongly report offline.
- Server state goes through Query; do NOT mirror it into Zustand. Use Zustand/local state only for genuine client-only UI state.

## Routing

- TanStack Router. Routes in `routes/` are thin wrappers; they render a `pages/` component and pass route params. No business logic, no data shaping in routes.
- `pages` compose `widgets`/`features`; they own layout and orchestration for a screen.

## Types & contracts

- Zod schemas in `packages/shared-types` are the single source of truth. Derive TypeScript types from them (`z.infer`) — never hand-write a parallel type or copy a type into an app.
- API request/response shapes, form schemas, and entity models all flow from these shared Zod schemas, used identically by web/api/mobile.
- Validate at boundaries (API responses, form input) with the shared schema; trust the inferred type inside the app.

## Components & quality

- TypeScript strict: no `any`, no `@ts-ignore`. Explicit return types on exports; JSDoc on exported functions/components.
- Cover all component states: Loading / Error / Empty / Success.
- Styling via Tailwind v4 utilities + CSS custom properties (tokens). No hardcoded px/colors scattered in components; no className arrays — use a `cn()` helper.
- Keep files focused (target ~50–150 lines). Public API of every slice is its `index.ts`.

## Done means

Typecheck clean, lint clean (`--max-warnings=0`), FSD boundaries green, tests pass, AND the UI verified visually in the browser at a high-end design bar.
